steps.title: Add the equations to eliminate y
steps.content:
The system consists of:
$19 = x + y$
$x - y = 9$

Adding these equations together eliminates $y$:
$(x + y) + (x - y) = 19 + 9$
$$2x = 28$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 2:
$$x = 14$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
